svg.text: Runs on separate CUDA stream — resolves keys to flat-table slot positions

g.text: Hit → slot in HBM cache. Miss → storage fallback.
LRU/LFU eviction: make room. Evicted data persisted.
Write-back: persist evicted cache entries to storage.
No cache. Direct hash table lookup on HBM storage.
CACHE: Hot keys in HBM cache, cold in storage.
with prev batch compute, hiding I/O latency.
